overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person action game showing a samurai warrior riding a horse along a scenic coastal cliffside trail during a vibrant sunset. The character transitions from an open ocean overlook into a dark, enclosed rocky canyon named 'Himiko's Garden' with atmospheric lighting and detailed natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal cliffside trail overlooking ocean

agents.ego_description: samurai warrior riding a horse along a coastal cliff path with the ocean visible to the right and setting sun ahead

entered.detail: dark smoke rising from debris on the right side of the trail
vast blue ocean stretching to the horizon with distant islands
large weathered rocks and boulders along the cliff edge
green leafy trees scattered along the left side of the path
worn dirt path with patches of grass running along the cliff
bright golden sun low on the horizon creating lens flare

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide coastal trail during golden hour, with a samurai riding a horse along a dirt path. To the right, the ocean stretches to the horizon while the setting sun creates a warm glow. Smoke rises from debris on the right, and scattered trees line the left side of the cliffside path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded coastal approach to rocky canyon

events.description: approaching and entering the dark rocky canyon entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride along the winding path as the vegetation becomes denser and the terrain more rocky

entered.detail: large boulders and rock outcroppings appearing along the path
thicker cluster of trees creating partial canopy over the trail
dark opening between rock walls marking the entry to the canyon

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a more densely wooded section with larger rock formations appearing. The ocean view shifts to the right as the path curves, and the vegetation becomes thicker. The segment ends as the rider approaches the dark entrance to a narrow rocky canyon.

events.description: entering deep shadow as the canyon walls block the sunlight
location text 'HIMIKO'S GARDEN' appears at bottom right of screen

agents.ego_description: riding through the narrow shadowy canyon with moss-covered walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock walls forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall moss-covered rock walls forming the right side of the narrow passage
rocks and ground covered in green moss in the dim light

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a narrow, shadowy canyon with towering moss-covered rock walls on both sides, blocking out most of the sunlight. The environment shifts dramatically from bright open coast to a dark, enclosed passage. The ground is covered in moss and the path winds between the rock formations as location text appears identifying the area as 'Himiko's Garden'.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open coastal cliffside into the shadowy depths of a narrow rocky canyon. It begins on a wide dirt trail during the golden hour, where a samurai on horseback rides alongside a vast ocean under the warm glow of a setting sun. As the path curves, the scene shifts into a more densely wooded area with larger rock formations and thicker vegetation that gradually obscures the horizon. The camera then follows the rider as they leave the sunlight behind, entering a dark, enclosed passage with towering moss-covered walls. Finally, the environment transforms into a dim, winding corridor of stone and greenery as the location is identified as Himiko's Garden.
